overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a survivor character exploring a post-apocalyptic mountain camp. The character walks along a dirt trail past wooden fortifications, abandoned vehicles, and an excavated pit with industrial piping, set against a backdrop of pine forests and snow-capped mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail between wooden fence and rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail with a rifle slung across the back

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running along the left side of the trail
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
steep rock face with sparse vegetation forming the right boundary
evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes
snow-capped peaks visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt mountain trail bordered by a wooden guardrail on the left and a steep rocky cliff on the right. Power lines run overhead between wooden poles, with pine forests and distant snow-capped mountains filling the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified camp entrance with wooden barricades

events.description: trail opens into a fortified survivor camp with wooden palisades and abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: approaching the camp entrance while passing discarded tires and wooden fortifications

entered.detail: tall vertical wooden logs forming a defensive wall
elevated wooden tower with a large satellite dish
derelict green military vehicle with canvas cover
stack of black rubber tires piled against the fence
large canvas tent with olive drab coloring

segments.scene_description: The trail widens into a makeshift survivor camp entrance marked by wooden palisade fences and abandoned military equipment. The character passes discarded tires and an abandoned truck while a satellite dish tower becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: excavated pit area with industrial piping and wooden retaining walls

events.description: character slows and turns to navigate around the deep muddy excavated pit

agents.ego_description: carefully walking around the edge of a large excavated pit with a yellow industrial pipe

entered.detail: deep dark hole in the ground with wooden support walls
large yellow flexible tubing running into the pit
vertical wooden planks shoring up the pit edges
boulder sitting near the pit edge

segments.scene_description: The ground becomes muddy and cracked as the character navigates around a large excavated pit with yellow industrial piping. Wooden retaining walls line the pit while the character circles the area, passing large rocks and temporary wooden fortifications.

scene_state.functional_zone: military camp area with watchtower and canvas tents

events.description: character turns left to walk along the side of the large green tent

agents.ego_description: walking past the military tent toward a wooden watchtower while surveying the camp

entered.detail: elevated platform with ladder and railings for surveillance
green fabric shade structure stretched between poles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the side of a large green military tent toward a wooden watchtower. The camp opens up with canvas canopies and power lines visible, while the muddy ground shows signs of heavy foot traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that gradually transitions into a cluttered, industrial survivor camp. It begins on a narrow dirt path bordered by a wooden guardrail and a steep rocky cliff, with power lines stretching overhead against a backdrop of pine forests and snow-capped mountains. As the trail widens, the environment shifts into a makeshift entrance marked by wooden palisade fences, abandoned military equipment, and a distant satellite dish tower. The terrain then becomes muddy and cracked as the camera navigates around a large excavated pit featuring yellow industrial piping and wooden retaining walls. Finally, the scene opens up further, passing a large green military tent and canvas canopies before moving toward a wooden watchtower.
